channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Crime plunges in major cities despite Trump's crackdown rhetoric
item.description: CopyData: Major Cities Chiefs Association (MCCA); Chart: Axios Visuals Violent crime dropped sharply across America's biggest cities in 2025, accordin...

item.title: Unusual FAA restriction closes El Paso airspace for 10 days
item.description: A 10-mile ring of airspace centered on El Paso, Texas, is effectively closed to aircraft for the next 10 days after the Federal Aviation Administratio...

item.title: The AI boom belongs to capital, not workers
item.description: Data: U.S. Commerce Department ; Chart: Jacque Schrag/Axios The United States is experiencing an investment boom from AI and the infrastructure that m...

item.title: AI's buildout continues to bleed cash
item.description: Data: Earnings, Bloomberg; Chart: Axios Visuals Spending by hyperscalers — the data center behemoths in the vanguard of the AI revolution — is expecte...

item.title: Ex-Biden officials keep him at a distance in their 2026 campaigns
item.description: At least nine Biden administration alumni running for Congress or governor this year are keeping President Biden at arm's length in the run-up to the ...

item.title: D.C. grand jury declines to indict six Democratic lawmakers
item.description: Federal prosecutors launched an investigation into the lawmakers after they released a short video advising current military members to reject “illega...

item.title: House rejects tariff restrictions in rebuke of Trump and Johnson
item.description: The vote opens the door to consideration of measures that would end the national emergency Trump declared to justify sweeping tariffs on other countri...

item.title: Democratic governors threaten to boycott Trump dinner over exclusions
item.description: The president left some governors, including Maryland’s Wes Moore, off the guest list for an event that has traditionally been bipartisan.

item.title: 5 takeaways from the Republican-led hearing on ICE
item.description: At least some in the GOP want ICE to tone it down.

item.title: FBI cited debunked claims to obtain warrant for Fulton County vote records, documents show
item.description: The FBI told a federal judge that it is investigating whether any “deficiencies” in Georgia officials’ handling of the 2020 presidential election were...

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
Ex-Trump voters swung hard to Democrats over costs in NJ & VA, new research shows
item.description: Voters who backed Donald Trump in 2024 and swung to Democrats in this year's Virginia and New Jersey elections did so over economic concerns, accordin...

item.title: Vance tries to thread affordability needle in Rust Belt
item.description: The vice president fine-tunes Trump’s economic message, but he's only got so much wiggle room.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
